summary: Frontend-only retest of PushNotificationButton after fix in iteration_15. Verified rendering on /altro tab after admin login. All acceptance criteria met.
critical_code_review_comments: PushNotificationButton.tsx: fix is correct — removed `checking` gate and stabilized `isSupported` via lazy useState initializer. Component now renders synchronously with correct state on first paint.
Minor: the useEffect body reads Notification.permission and setState even though it matches the initial 'default' — no bug, just an extra render. Acceptable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PushNotificationButton renders correctly in Altro tab. Chromium headless env has Notification.permission='denied' so the push-btn-denied card appears at bottom of /altro with red border and text 'Notifiche bloccate ...'. All 6 altro-card-* grid items (maestro, alimentazione, classifica, curiosita, eventi, profilo) render above the push card as expected. serviceWorker + PushManager both available so unsupported branch is not triggered in this env. Backend was previously verified 10/10 in web_push_results.xml.

test_results_detail.login_admin: PASS — redirected to /home after ACCEDI click
test_results_detail.push_btn_denied_visible: PASS — [data-testid='push-btn-denied'] found with text 'Notifiche bloccate Hai negato le notifiche dal browser. Per riattivarle: apri le impostazioni del sito, autorizza le notifiche, poi ricarica la pagina.'
test_results_detail.altro_cards_rendered: PASS — all 6 altro-card-* present (maestro, alimentazione, classifica, curiosita, eventi, profilo). Push button did NOT block other grid rendering.
test_results_detail.click_subscribe_test: N/A — permission is denied so subscribe card doesn't render in this env. Cannot test requestPermission crash behavior here.
